python_module.notes: Replace `${GPD_PYTHON}` with a Python >=3.11 interpreter that has GPD installed.

description: GPD physics verification checks. Tools for running contract-aware checks, dimensional analysis, domain and bundle-specific checklists, limiting case checks, symmetry verification, and coverage gap analysis. Contract-aware requests follow the `contract` schema. Always run `suggest_contract_checks(...)` to gather the per-check request metadata before calling `run_contract_check(...)`, and never invent grounding or proof artifacts.
name: gpd-verification
prerequisites: Install GPD before enabling built-in MCP servers.
